programme.title: The Lost Valentine
programme.desc: Susan Allison, TV reporter, receives a sentimental news assignment: the story of Caroline Thomas, who has waited 60 years for her pilot husband; declared missing in action during World War II, to return to her.

programme.title: Love Under the Stars
programme.desc: When a 30-something woman living in an infinite state of youth is finally forced out into the real world, she befriends a young girl and a widower that will teach her that it is okay to grow up. Stars Ashley Newbrough.

programme.title: Winter Love Story
programme.desc: When author Cassie's first novel isn't selling, she is paired on a book tour with author Elliot to boost Cassie's sales - but along the way a romance starts to blossom. Stars Jen Lilley, Kevin McGarry, and Mary-Margaret Humes.

programme.title: Once Upon a Prince
programme.desc: Susanna accepts help one day from handsome stranger Nate. Sparks between them fly, but when a photo of them gets leaked to the press, Susanna is in for a shock when she discovers he's about to become King Nathaniel of Cambria.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Molly runs the very popular Bridal Boot Camp, helping prospective brides-to-be get in shape, for their big day. But things get complicated when she meets Nick, the fiancé of one of her clients and sparks fly.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Newly engaged Nick and Molly have six weeks to plan the wedding of their dreams. Things get even more complicated when Steven, who once left Molly at the altar, comes back into her life with a business offer.

programme.title: The Color of Rain
programme.desc: When Gina loses her husband on Christmas Day, she soon finds a kindred spirit in another parent at her kids' school, Michael, who loses his wife at the same time. Stars Lacey Chabert and Warren Christie.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: A mix up on her first day of work sends Shane to the Dead Letter Office, where a group of quirky characters led by Oliver try to deliver the undeliverable. Stars Eric Mabius and Kristin Booth. SSD Movie #1.

programme.title: Love, Of Course
programme.desc: When widowed mother Amy moves her daughter Cara to her college dorm, Amy finds herself searching for the next step. While at the university, Amy gets an offer she can't refuse and meets Noah and discovers a new life of her own.

programme.title: Loving Leah
programme.desc: When Leah's husband Benjamin dies suddenly, Benjamin's brother Jake is stunned to learn he is expected to marry Leah to carry on the name. Jake suggests to Leah that they get married and maintain a secretly platonic relationship.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: Maddie is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, Maddie's luck begins to turn around in all aspects of her life. But then her first love Nate unexpectedly returns.

programme.title: Falling for You
programme.desc: Radio host Lacey is hosting a bachelor bakeoff to raise money to save the radio station. When her star bachelor backs out, she enlists visiting businessman Zac to fill the spot.

programme.title: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Mina has everything going for her, but her world is suddenly turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee to convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Dying for Chocolate
programme.desc: Colorado caterer Goldy Berry teams with detective Tom Schultz to identify the ingredients that led to the mysterious death of her friend — and ends up discovering a hidden recipe for murder. Stars Nikki Deloach and Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Truly, Madly, Sweetly
programme.desc: When Natalie and Eric each inherit a share of an old bakery, this unlikely pair must decide what's in store for this historic landmark. When both of their careers come to a screeching halt, an opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Crown for Christmas
programme.desc: After getting fired from her job, Allie accepts a temp job as governess to Princess Theodora. A spark forms between Allie and Theodora's father Maximillion, the King of Winshire.

programme.title: Love in Design
programme.desc: In need of a shakeup on her home-makeover TV show, Hannah is sent to her New England hometown to renovate the historical Lewisburg Manor. Her old flame Jeff is assigned to make sure Hannah's design preserves the historical manor.

programme.title: Season for Love
programme.desc: When a talented chef returns to her Texas hometown, she winds up entering the town's famous BBQ cookoff and gets more than she bargained for when the surprise judge turns out to be her high school love. Stars Autumn Reeser.

programme.title: Love, Once and Always
programme.desc: When Lucy's childhood sweetheart plans to tear down the Gilded Age estate and replace it with a golf course, Lucy fights to preserve the historic mansion at all costs. Stars Amanda Schull and Peter Porte.

programme.title: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: Fired from her job as a reality TV host, Natalie returns home for Valentine's Day, only to find herself running the town festival's auction with her ex-fiance thanks to two scheming mothers. Bethany Joy Lenz, Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Love on the Amazon
programme.desc: Claire travels to Brazil and hires Danny, a riverboat captain, to help her deliver an important message for her sister Amelia, a marine biologist studying pink dolphins on the Amazon River. Stars Jaicy Elliot, Rafael de la Fuente.

programme.title: Catch of the Day
programme.desc: On the eve of becoming a NY executive chef, Sophie returns home to help her family's flailing restaurant and runs into Cam, an old crush who makes her question everything. Stars Emilie Ullerup, Michael Rady, and Katie Lee Biegel.

programme.title: Summer Villa
programme.desc: A romance novelist with writer's block and a celebrity chef suffering from a bad review accidentally end up staying at the same French villa for the summer. A connection grows as they attempt to share the house.

programme.title: Pearl in Paradise
programme.desc: Alex, a photographer for a travel magazine, and Colin, a best-selling author, team up to find an elusive Fijian pearl.

programme.title: A Pinch of Portugal
programme.desc: When a celebrity chef walks off his show, prep cook Anna must step into the spotlight and make the show her own, with the help of her Aussie cameraman and Portuguese location scout. Stars Heather Hemmens, Luke Mitchell.

programme.title: Falling in Love in Niagara
programme.desc: After her fiancé leaves her before their wedding, MADELINE goes to Niagara Falls to honeymoon without him. There, she reconnects with her adventurous side, learns to let go, and finds new love. Stars Jocelyn Hudon, Dan Jeannotte.

programme.title: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: When an aspiring chef lands an assistant job at her idol's restaurant, she's convinced her big break is just around the corner. After a rocky start, she befriends the handsome executive chef and they begin bonding in the kitchen.

programme.title: Fourth Down and Love
programme.desc: Sparks are reignited when a single mother and a pro football player coincidentally meet again on her daughter's flag football field after his career is interrupted by a sports injury. Stars Pascale Hutton, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Blind Date Book Club
programme.desc: A bookstore owner finds love and direction in life after agreeing to review a famous author's new novel in her blind-date-with-a-book club. Stars Erin Krakow, Robert Buckley.

programme.title: The Way to You
programme.desc: New Yorkers Emma and Conrad agree to help each other find their missed connections after a subway blackout. Their search might lead to love, but not where either of them expects to find it. Stars Kim Matula, Aaron O'Connell.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Cleo Morelli, an aspiring Portland chef, tries to win a food truck competition while the competition tries to win her heart. Stars Natalie Hall and Michael Rady.

programme.title: Romance in Style
programme.desc: Ella's unique designs inspire publishing mogul Derek to include plus-sized fashion in his magazine. Soon, Derek begins to realize that Ella's influence reaches far beyond the catwalk. Stars Jaicy Elliot, Benjamin Hollingsworth.

programme.title: Make Me a Match
programme.desc: Vivi enlists the help of an Indian Matchmaker, Raina, to change her fate in love. However, Raina's son Bhumesh just might be the change Vivi needed all along. Stars Rushi Kota and Eva Bourne.

programme.title: Return to Office
programme.desc: After making the return to the office on a hybrid schedule, two coworkers known to each other only as Ms. Monday and Mr. Tuesday start sending friendly notes, sparking an office romance. Stars Janel Parrish, Scott Michael Foster.

programme.title: The Professional Bridesmaid
programme.desc: When a Professional Bridesmaid books a high-profile wedding, she must keep her true identity a secret, not only from the wedding party but also from the handsome reporter covering the event. Stars Hunter King, Chandler Massey.

programme.title: Royally Ever After
programme.desc: Danny proposes to Sara and reveals he is the prince of St. Ives. They need his disapproving parents' blessing. Sara must fight to remain true to herself, while adjusting to this new lifestyle.

programme.title: Bottled with Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out. Stars Bethany Joy Lenz, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Molly runs the very popular Bridal Boot Camp, helping prospective brides-to-be get in shape, for their big day. But things get complicated when she meets Nick, the fiancé of one of her clients and sparks fly.

programme.title: A Picture of Her
programme.desc: Beth unwittingly becomes the subject of an award-winning magazine's cover and goes on a quest to uncover the true identity of the mystery photographer who snapped her photo. Stars Tyler Hynes, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: Love to the Rescue
programme.desc: Two single parents come head to head when their kids want to adopt the same dog. Agreeing to co-foster, free-spirited Kate and type-A Eric must work together to find the dog's forever home. Starring Nikki DeLoach and Michael Rady.

programme.title: Heaven Down Here
programme.desc: An overwhelmed waitress, along with a pastor, a hospice nurse, and a manager, all desperately in need of a Christmas miracle, get snowed in together at a local diner. Starring Krystal Joy Brown, Tina Lifford, and Phylicia Rashad.

programme.title: Following Yonder Star
programme.desc: A former television star waits out a scandal in Vermont. She becomes close with the innkeeper and his daughter while she helps him direct the local children's Christmas pageant. Stars Brooke D'Orsay and John Brotherton.

programme.title: Christmas in Montana
programme.desc: Before the holidays, Sara goes to Montana to help resistant Travis save his ranch. Can time on the ranch help restore her faith in Christmas in time for a miracle? Stars Kellie Martin, Colin Ferguson.

programme.title: A Maple Valley Christmas
programme.desc: Rancher Erica has spent her whole life working the family farm with her mother and sister. When Aaron arrives and disrupts her plans, she starts to question what it is she actually wants. Starring Peyton List and Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Christmas Quest
programme.desc: Stefanie teams up with ex-husband Chase to go to Iceland at Christmastime in search of the legendary treasure of the Yule Lads. Lacey Chabert, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
programme.desc: Single mom Jennifer Cullen is having trouble finding joy in the holiday season. Then her Uncle Ralph arrives at her home with the young, handsome Morgan Derby. Morgan's love of Christmas, and life, is contagious.

programme.title: Haul Out the Holly
programme.desc: When Emily unexpectedly spends the holidays alone at her parents' house, their HOA insists that she participate in its many Christmas festivities. Lacey Chabert, Wes Brown, Stephen Tobolowsky, Melissa Peterman, Ellen Travolta.

programme.title: Santa Tell Me
programme.desc: A design show host finds a letter from Santa promising to meet her true love, a man named Nick, by Christmas Eve. Meeting three Nicks complicates her search. Stars Erin Krakow, Daniel Lissing, Benjamin Ayres, Christopher Russell.

programme.title: Single on the 25th
programme.desc: Despite being lonely during the holidays, Nell finds a fresh outlook when her neighbor Cooper shows her the joy of celebrating Christmas single. Starring Lyndsy Fonseca and Daniel Lissing.

programme.title: If I Only Had Christmas
programme.desc: At Christmas, a cheerful publicist teams up with a cynical VP and his eclectic team to help a charity in need. Stars Candace Cameron Bure and Warren Christie.

programme.title: Picture a Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: A photographer who travels the world takes a few days off around the holidays to care for her grandmother. While there, she meets her neighbor, DAVID who needs help watching his 7 year old nephew. Stars Merritt Patterson, Jon Cor.

programme.title: Tidings for the Season
programme.desc: News anchor, Adam, is challenged by superfan, Robbie, to report good news at Christmas. Adam reluctantly takes him under his wing and finds a connection with Robbie's mom. Stars Tamera Mowry-Housley, BJ Britt, Elijah-Justus Lewis.

programme.title: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: Host Tamera Mowry-Housley greets ten family pairs of bakers at the holiday baking barn, where they first must prove themselves with pie, and then heat things up with some exquisite yule logs.

programme.title: Checkin' It Twice
programme.desc: A journeyman hockey player falls for a real estate agent in a career crisis when he's traded to her hometown and moves into the cottage in her hockey loving family's backyard. Starring Kim Matula and Kevin McGarry.

programme.title: A Reason for the Season
programme.desc: In order to earn her trust fund and with the help of a handsome local attorney, Evie is tasked with granting Christmas wishes to the people who saved her life on the night of her birth. Stars Taylor Cole and Kevin McGarry.

programme.title: Five Gold Rings
programme.desc: An artist returns home for the holidays and gets tasked with a Christmas quest left by her grandmother. She and the local PI must return lost items to their owners before Christmas. Starring Nolan Gerard Funk and Holland Roden.

programme.title: The Christmas Charade
programme.desc: Facing another dull Christmas alone, sparks fly when a risk-averse librarian accidentally gets wrapped up with a grinchy FBI agent in an undercover mission to save the Heart of Christmas. Stars Rachel Skarsten, Corey Sevier.

programme.title: My Christmas Family Tree
programme.desc: When Vanessa receives the results from her Family Tree DNA test, she discovers a family she didn't know existed and travels to their home for Christmas. Starring Aimee Teegarden, Andrew Walker, and James Tupper.

programme.title: Oy to the World!
programme.desc: Nikki, a perfectionist, must reconnect with her childhood rival, Jake, an aspiring musician, as the duo unites choirs for a performance honoring Christmas and Hanukkah. Starring Brooke D'Orsay, and Jake Epstein.

programme.title: Scouting For Christmas
programme.desc: A single mom tries to make her daughter's Christmas special since her dad is working overseas for the holidays. She partners with her daughter's favorite baker for the Holiday Ball. Starring Tamera Mowry-Housley and Carlo Marks.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: Beloved cooking show host Billie Blessings finds herself in hot water when a dead body turns up in the car of one of her guests, a temperamental celebrity chef, with dark secrets in his past. Stars Holly Robinson Peete, Rick Fox.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries: A Murder in Mind
programme.desc: Billie Blessings investigates murder charges against friend and actress Katie Saunders, when a death is linked to her TV show based on a series of novels about a corrupt local lawyer. Stars Holly Robinson Peete, Rick Fox.

programme.title: Francesca Quinn, PI
programme.desc: Private investigator Francesca "Frankie" Quinn is hired to find her fiancée's killer. She must work with her detective ex, Wyn, and trust the person who broke them up and ruined their lives. Stars Mallory Jansen, Dylan Bruce.

programme.title: Crimes of Fashion: Killer Clutch
programme.desc: An American psychologist, hired to coach a fashion designer, helps a guarded French detective unravel a list of fashionable suspects after a murder happens backstage of a Paris fashion show. Stars Brooke D'Orsay, Gilles Marini.

programme.title: The Jane Mysteries: Inheritance Lost
programme.desc: Singer Jane DaSilva inherits the family foundation which finds justice for those who aren't able to help themselves. Together with Detective John Cameron she brings hope to many hopeless cases. Stars Jodie Sweetin, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Family Practice Mysteries: Coming Home
programme.desc: A former Army surgeon moves back to her hometown and joins a practice of family doctors, but when she's drawn into solving the mysterious death of a patient, her quiet life becomes upended. Stars Amanda Schull, Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Gourmet Detective Pilot
programme.desc: A chef turned culinary sleuth is partnered with a beautiful detective to unravel the clues surrounding the unexpected death of a guest at a prestigious dinner party. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns and Matthew Kevin Anderson.

programme.title: A Healthy Place to Die: A Gourmet Detective Mystery
programme.desc: When Henry, the Gourmet Detective, is invited as a guest speaker at a luxury resort spa, he quickly finds himself at the center of another murder. Stars Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns.

programme.title: Death al Dente: A Gourmet Detective Mystery
programme.desc: San Francisco homicide detective Maggie Price and former, world-class chef Henry Ross are on the case once again. The crime-solving odd couple investigates the murder of Henry's friend.

programme.title: Eat, Drink and Be Buried: A Gourmet Detective Mystery
programme.desc: Henry and Maggie attend party of a local publisher, where his son and stepson reenact a historical dual. Someone, however, has loaded the pistol with a real musket ball, so when son pulls the trigger, he kills his stepbrother.

programme.title: Roux the Day: A Gourmet Detective Mystery
programme.desc: Henry and Maggie find themselves in a murder mystery where secrets hidden within a treasured recipe book have dire consequences for all who own it. Starring Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: A Tale of Three Letters
programme.desc: The POstables are back identifying the intended recipients of a trio of dead letters which have a surprising, personal impact on all of them. Stars Eric Mabius, Kristin Booth, Yan-Kay Crystal Lowe, Geoff Gustafson, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Murder, with Love
programme.desc: Former prosecutor-turned-therapist Hailey Dean is acutely observant. During a tragic week, one of her patients loses her parents to fatal accidents. Stars Kellie Martin, Viv Leacock, Giacomo Baessato, Cindy Busby.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When Hailey helps her friend Pam sell her recently deceased parent's estate, she becomes suspicious when Pam suddenly leaves town without notice. To make matters worse, Pam's boyfriend is the sudden victim of an accident.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Dating is Murder
programme.desc: Attorney turned therapist Hailey Dean is pulled into another investigation when a popular new dating app links multiple missing persons cases from around the city. Stars Kellie Martin.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: Site Unseen
programme.desc: A dedicated archaeologist gets involved in a murder investigation when she and her students unearth a dead body while searching for evidence of a 17th-century coastal Maine settlement. Stars Courtney Thorne-Smith and James Tupper.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: Past Malice
programme.desc: When Emma Fielding is recruited to aid in a groundbreaking discovery beneath the Chandler Castle, she is swept into another mystery when she finds her colleague murdered in the crypts. Stars Courtney Thorne Smith, James Tupper.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: More Bitter than Death
programme.desc: After a friend and head of the National Archaeological Society meets an untimely death, Emma and Agent Conner find themselves questioning her colleagues' motives. Stars Courtney Thorne-Smith, James Tupper.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Silent Witness
programme.desc: When consumer reporter, Ruby Herring stumbles onto a murder, the spunky redhead discovers a knack for crime solving. With the help of a handsome detective, Ruby finds a new career covering crime. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Her Last Breath
programme.desc: Ruby and Detective Killian investigate a suspicious fatal car accident. With their yin and yang relationship, they solve the case, until Ruby finds new evidence that they may have it all wrong. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.
